instruction:
In each of the following equations, determine which variable represents the angle and which variable represents the value of the trigonometric function.
(a) In the equation $q=\sin p$, [ANS] represents the angle and [ANS] represents the value of the trigonometric function. (b) In the equation $p=\tan^{-1}q$, [ANS] represents the angle and [ANS] represents the value of the trigonometric function. (c) In the equation $\arccos d=f$, [ANS] represents the angle and [ANS] represents the value of the trigonometric function.
output: p, q, p, q, f, d
